overview: Cognitive Load Aware Learning System — a full-stack platform that helps college students prepare for job placements using adaptive learning. The system tracks cognitive load in real time and adjusts quiz difficulty and content to match each student's learning state.
features: Internet Identity authentication with session persistence
250 real placement-oriented quiz questions (50 per subject)
Real cognitive load engine using weighted performance metrics
Adaptive quiz difficulty based on Low/Moderate/High cognitive load
Dashboard with progress tracking, daily streak, and Recharts analytics
5 learning modules: Aptitude, DBMS, OOPS, System Design, Technical MCQs
Timed 50-question quiz sessions with auto-submit and result analysis
Analytics page with cognitive load trends, subject accuracy, and recommendations
Mock interview module with Technical and HR question modes
Glassmorphism UI with dark/light mode and responsive design
